description_long: This is a small, rounded bottle with a wide, octagonal base and a slightly tapered neck, sealed with a wooden, faceted screw-on cap. The body of the bottle is transparent, revealing a white or light-colored lotion inside, and is wrapped with a blue label featuring white stylized text and a cartoonish cow illustration. The label encircles the bottle, with the cow graphic most prominent on the front, suggesting a dairy or milk-based lotion product. The cap appears to be made of wood or a wood-textured plastic, contrasting with the smooth, glossy plastic of the bottle. The overall design is compact and ergonomic, suitable for personal use and easy to carry. The bottle's visual style is playful and approachable, making it appealing for everyday urban use.
description: A compact, clear bottle with a blue label featuring white text and a cartoon cow, sealed with a wooden screw-on cap. The bottle contains a white lotion and has a playful, approachable design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue label with white text and a prominent cartoon cow illustration, as well as the wooden cap.
description_view_1: Side view with the blue label wrapping around, showing partial text and less of the cow graphic.
description_view_2: Rear view with mostly blue label and white text, no visible cow illustration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the cow illustration partially visible and more of the label's text.
